issues.title: Enemy damage spike on floor 12 encounter 2
issues.description: Enemy dealt 78 damage in a single enemy turn when player had 100 HP (78.0% of current HP)
issues.suggestedFix: Consider reducing enemy damage scaling or adding damage caps for single hits

issues.title: 28 consecutive easy encounters (floors 1-10)
reproductionSteps: Observe lack of challenge — player never drops below 90 HP
issues.suggestedFix: Increase enemy damage or HP in early/mid floors to create more tension

issues.title: Player defeated despite 89.4% accuracy
issues.description: Player was defeated on floor 24 with 89.4% overall accuracy (1036 correct, 123 wrong). High accuracy should yield better survivability.
reproductionSteps: Play through full run with high accuracy
Observe that good play still results in defeat
issues.suggestedFix: Increase healing from correct answers or reduce enemy damage scaling in later floors

issues.title: Difficulty spike on floor 3 encounter 2 (the_archivist)
issues.description: Encounter took 7 turns to resolve, but the previous floor (2) averaged 3.0 turns. This is a 2.3x spike.
issues.suggestedFix: Review the_archivist stats — HP or damage may be disproportionately high for floor 3
